title: Questions from Quarantine: Contact Tracing Failures
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday and if you have a question that you want answered tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday and if you have a question that you want answered tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . result.main_content_en: This article introduces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who provide advice on managing life during a global health crisis. The specific focus is on contact tracing failures, highlighting the challenges in implementing effective public health measures during the COVID-19 pandemic. The series invites public participation by submitting questions via social media. The context is part of the Security and Global Health Project's efforts to disseminate expert knowledge on coronavirus response, global health, and public health security.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为'隔离期问题'的每周网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，就全球健康危机期间的生活管理提供建议。文章特别聚焦于接触者追踪的失败，强调了在COVID-19大流行期间实施有效公共卫生措施所面临的挑战。该系列鼓励公众通过社交媒体提交问题。这一内容是'安全与全球健康项目'的一部分，旨在传播有关冠状病毒应对、全球健康和公共卫生安全方面的专家知识。
